bug.description: incorrect type cast causing data corruption or misinterpretation

prompt:
There is a incorrect type cast causing data corruption or misinterpretation downstream of function get_prs_max_dl_toa in the openair1/PHY/NR_UE_ESTIMATION subsystem.
The function is located at openair1/PHY/NR_UE_ESTIMATION/nr_dl_channel_estimation.c:88.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
